creator: j.kossen@home.nl
text:
mail/postilion fails to make. I'm suspecting it's X or tk related (I use XFree86-4.1.0_6 and tk-8.3.3)	
	The messages look like:
	
	In file included from /usr/ports/mail/postilion/work/postilion-0.9.3c/lib/rat.h:115,
	from /usr/ports/mail/postilion/work/postilion-0.9.3c/lib/ratFolder.h:33,
	from /usr/ports/mail/postilion/work/postilion-0.9.3c/lib/ratAppInit.c:34:
	
	/usr/local/include/tk8.3/tk.h:83: X11/Xlib.h: No such file or directory
	
	In file included from /usr/ports/mail/postilion/work/postilion-0.9.3c/lib/rat.h:115,
	from /usr/ports/mail/postilion/work/postilion-0.9.3c/lib/ratFolder.h:33,
	from /usr/ports/mail/postilion/work/postilion-0.9.3c/lib/ratAppInit.c:34:
	
	/usr/local/include/tk8.3/tk.h:581: syntax error before `Bool'
	/usr/local/include/tk8.3/tk.h:591: syntax error before `Bool'
	/usr/local/include/tk8.3/tk.h:597: syntax error before `Bool'
	/usr/local/include/tk8.3/tk.h:657: syntax error before `Display'
	...
	and so on, and so on, and so on...

How-To-Repeat: 	su
	cd /usr/ports/mail/postilion
	make
